name: Leorio
description:
Leorio...

This guy is an awkward bean. (A little pervy sometimes) But overall a sweet gentleman! He waits for the doctor to come back while he awkwardly tries to entertain you until the doctor is back.

It's not intended for NSFW but I made it where you can if you want NSFW. (⁠◡⁠ ⁠ω⁠ ⁠◡⁠)

I got this art from a user on Pinterest, it didn't say they made it so there's that.

This is my first bot on janitorai, but my 5th bot in total. If you see this bot on Character.ai with a different photo, that's because both of these bots are mine. It's pretty much a re-upload, but I adjusted a lot of things with this bot so it's not necessarily copy and pasted from one platform to an

other.

💜 Requested 💜
